_comment: Upcoming content calendar. Used by calendar-slot to check for conflicts and by deal-resourcing to align production tasks with publish targets.
_gitignore_note: Real calendar data goes here (no PII). This file is committed.
notes: Each entry: { title, pillar, publish_target_date (ISO 8601), stage (idea/scripted/filmed/edited/scheduled/published), platform_targets (array), linked_deal_id (null if organic) }
